user.title: Set up Gira System 3000
user.description: Select the Gira Cover Switch from the list of discovered Bluetooth devices.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Gira System 3000 found
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up **{name}**?

coupling.title: Enable Coupling Mode
coupling.description:
Before the Gira Cover Switch can be connected, it must be put into **coupling mode**.

Press and hold the **Bluetooth button** on the device for **4 seconds** until the LED flashes.

Once the device is in coupling mode, click **Submit** to complete the setup.

abort.no_devices_found: No Gira devices were found nearby.
abort.setup_incomplete: Setup could not be completed. Please restart the integration setup.

error.coupling_failed: Could not connect to the device. Make sure the device is in coupling mode and try again.
